Speaking as a Texan where the majority of the restaurants are in the west and southwest of the States, the food is good, though compare it to other big fast food restaurants, and it's meh in comparison. Jack in the Box nowadays no longer serve (fuckin') shrimp, though they only serve burgers, tacos, and chicken to name a few items they have.
